hero.title: Dermatologist
hero.subtitle: Clinical • Surgical • Aesthetic
hero.description: Researcher, preceptor of the Dermatology Residency at HU-UFSC, and board member of SBD/SC. Science and care for your skin health.

about.label: About
about.title: Science that cares
about.description: Graduated in Medicine from UFSC in 2016, with Dermatology Residency at the UFSC University Hospital. Currently pursuing a Master's in Medical Sciences, researching nail psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis.
about.text_2: As a preceptor of the Dermatology Residency at HU-UFSC, I train the dermatologists of tomorrow. I lead the High-Frequency Ultrasound and Confocal Microscopy outpatient clinic.
about.text_3: Board member of the Santa Catarina Dermatology Society (SBD-SC), I attend international congresses such as EADV in Paris and the Brazilian Dermatology Congress.
about.highlight_1: Researcher in melanoma and dermatologic surgery

services.label: Services
services.title: Three pillars of care
services.subtitle: Each area of dermatology requires specialized knowledge. I work across all three to provide comprehensive care.

clinical.title: Clinical Dermatology
clinical.description: Diagnosis and treatment of skin conditions with scientific evidence and advanced technology.
clinical.items: Acne, Skin Cancer, Melasma, Dermatitis, Psoriasis, Skin Allergy, Scarring, Rosacea, Melanoma, Hyperpigmentation, Total Body Mapping

surgical.title: Surgical Dermatology
surgical.description: Dermatologic surgical procedures with precision and safety.
surgical.items: Skin tumor removal, Nail surgery, Earlobe repair, Skin biopsies

aesthetic.title: Aesthetic Dermatology
aesthetic.description: Aesthetic treatments with medical perspective and natural results.
aesthetic.items: Hyaluronic acid, Fillers, Botulinum toxin, Lasers, Chemical peels, Biostimulators, Facial rejuvenation

technology.label: Technology
technology.title: Technology serving precision
technology.subtitle: State-of-the-art equipment for more accurate diagnoses and detailed follow-up.

fotofinder.title: Total Body Mapping
fotofinder.description: FotoFinder system for complete mapping of moles and lesions, essential for monitoring patients at risk of melanoma.

ultrasound.title: Dermatologic Ultrasound
ultrasound.description: High-frequency imaging exam for non-invasive evaluation of skin lesions, tumors, and skin structures.

confocal.title: Confocal Microscopy
confocal.description: In vivo cellular skin analysis, enabling diagnosis without biopsy in many cases.

clinic.label: The Clinic
clinic.title: UNA Dermatologia
clinic.subtitle: A new concept in dermatologic treatment
clinic.description: Founded in 2023, UNA Dermatologia was born from the vision of offering complete dermatology — clinical, aesthetic, surgical, exams, and technologies — in a single space designed for patient well-being.
clinic.address: Rua Angelo La Porta, 53 - Suite 904, Centro, Florianópolis/SC

contact.title: Book your appointment
contact.subtitle: Private practice. Schedule via WhatsApp or Doctoralia.
